A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

[Parkour Party]
A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.

title: The Legend of Neverland
notes:
New Features
- The brand-new progression system, Blossom Manor, is now available!
1. Manor Details
  - This feature unlocks at Lv.154. Adventurers can build rooms in the Manor and invite Flower Fairies to move in to gain attribute bonuses.
  - Construction requires available tiles and consumes [Concept Book] items and [Concept Points].
  - The Manor can be upgraded. After leveling up, more tiles will be unlocked and the [Concept Points] cap will be increased.
2. Room Details
  - Rooms can be upg

title: KKTeenPatti - Poker, Slots
notes:
1. Cricket Craze PVP: Support your team in our new PVP mode, outsmart the competition and split the losers' stakes. The bigger the bet, the bigger the win!
2. Supercar Rush Event: Bet, spin, and build! Race through 5 levels of supercar construction to claim your massive Gold rewards!

title: Rap Star:Idle Clicker
notes: bugs fix!

title: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City
notes: Addressed an issue with the MIXTAPE radio station not playing custom playlists.

title: Clash of Kings - CoK
notes:
What's New:
1. Guiding Bug - Traverse, Guiding Bug - Blaze, and Enigma Dragon Grapheme Stone will be available in the Unstable Store from Jun 15.
2. Feature Optimizations
- A second confirmation prompt has been added when taking back Alliance buildings.
- The Empire Domination world map entrance will only be displayed during the Battle Stage.
- Tabs have been added to Tactic Books, and you can now swipe directly from the first page to the latest page. Requires Version 11.19 or later.
